name: Conch Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ground conch with green pepper, onion, salt, black pepper, and baking powder.
2. Stir in the tomato paste and self-rising flour until well combined.
3. Shape the mixture into balls.
4. Carefully spoon the balls into hot oil.
5. Fry the balls until golden brown.
6. Serve with cocktail sauce.
7. (Optional) Add 2 teaspoons of hot sauce to the batter before mixing.
